title: ws: ChatTypingEvent and ChatPresenceEvent receive and dispatch
description:
Implement receive and dispatch of ephemeral server-push events in ws/connection.rs:
- ChatTypingEvent: {chatId, senderId, typing: bool} — dispatch to AppEvent::TypingIndicator
- ChatPresenceEvent: {contactId, presence, statusText?, statusEmoji?} — dispatch to AppEvent::PresenceUpdate
- Decay timer: if no ChatTypingEvent for a (chatId, senderId) pair within 10s, auto-hide indicator
- Unknown event types: log at DEBUG level and ignore (forward compatibility)
- ChatStreamEnable/Disable is independent of Chat.receiveTypingIndicators — both are evaluated independently by server
- Tests: mock server sends event, assert correct AppEvent dispatched
close_reason: Epic complete: WebSocket transport client implemented, reviewed, and all review issues resolved
